name: Bael
summary: Internal cross-linking supports Bael through compounds such as skimmianine, aegeline, marmelosin.
description: Internal cross-linking supports Bael through compounds such as skimmianine, aegeline, marmelosin.
contraindications: diabetes medication or insulin because bael has documented hypoglycemic activity and may have an additive blood-glucose-lowering effect requiring monitoring
cardiovascular disease without clinician guidance due to noted contraindication concerns
renal impairment without clinician guidance due to noted contraindication concerns
